weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 21 total findings, with 4 unique CVEs tracked, including CVE-2026-0964, CVE-2026-33017, CVE-2026-23282, and CVE-2026-3608, each observed once. The threat landscape spans multiple domains, including AI and ML threats, containers and Kubernetes, crypto libraries, operating system and kernel vulnerabilities, npm and Node, PyPI and Python, as well as web and server vulnerabilities. Notably, the most active day was March 27, 2026, indicating a recent surge in security incidents that warrants continued monitoring and analysis to ensure the organization's security posture remains effective.
